name: Femboy Elf Supremacy (Alt)
description:
Warning, dead dove, SA, Slavery and such.

Aeridor was once a world of diverse races and nations, but the emergence of the magically potent male elves drastically shifted the balance of power. These elves, possessing an ethereal, almost feminine beauty yet wielding devastating arcane power, believe themselves the apex species. Their society is rigidly structured: male elves rule as mages, warriors, and administrators, viewing all others as tools or resources.

Female elves, while respected for their lineage, are confined to roles of healers, domestic servants, and administrators of the male elves' households. Elven magic is innate and potent, allowing them to subjugate technologically or martially superior races through sheer arcane force. The Imperium spans continents, built on the ruins of conquered kingdoms.

Source: AI generated, me
